response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  mca.yr_mth,
  mca.cust_id,
  mca.ord_cnt AS agg_ord_cnt,
  COUNT(oh.ord_id) AS fact_ord_cnt,
  CASE WHEN mca.ord_cnt = COUNT(oh.ord_id) THEN 'MATCH' ELSE 'MISMATCH' END AS reconciliation_status
FROM main.mth_cust_agg mca
LEFT JOIN main.ord_hdr oh
  ON mca.cust_id = oh.cust_id
  AND STRFTIME(oh.ord_dt, '%Y-%m') = mca.yr_mth
  AND oh.sts_cd <> 'X'
GROUP BY mca.yr_mth, mca.cust_id, mca.ord_cnt
HAVING mca.ord_cnt <> COUNT(oh.ord_id)
ORDER BY mca.yr_mth, mca.cust_id
LIMIT 100;",
  "reason": "DuckDB uses STRFTIME for date formatting, not TO_CHAR. Fixed function call."
}
```
